area_anchor: Brikette support and deals pages reset booking intent instead of preserving or segmenting it
current_truth: Deals and support/help surfaces still default their commercial handoff to the hostel booking path. Private-intent users can be dropped back into the dorm narrative, while unknown-intent users are not given an explicit dorm-vs-private choice.
next_scope_now: Implement intent-aware booking routing for deals and support surfaces so known private intent is preserved and unknown intent receives an explicit dorm/private chooser instead of a silent hostel default.
adjacent_later: Extend the same intent-aware chooser model to secondary support/content CTA clusters such as AlsoHelpful.
Add dedicated GA4 breakdown for chooser branch selection on neutral support surfaces.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: deals and support pages should preserve private intent or explicitly segment dorm vs private
why: Neutral commercial-support surfaces are currently optimized for the hostel funnel only, which causes private-intent leakage and weakens the coherence of the broader Brikette sales flow.

intended_outcome.statement: Brikette deals and support surfaces preserve known private intent and present an explicit dorm/private booking choice when intent is unknown, instead of silently defaulting to the hostel booking path.
